lines.en: Excuse me, I have a bad cold. Can you help me find some medicine?
lines.zh: 打扰一下，我感冒很严重。能帮我找一些药吗？

lines.en: Of course. Do you have a fever or just a runny nose?
lines.zh: 当然可以。你发烧了吗，还是只是流鼻涕？

lines.en: I have a sore throat and a cough. No fever.
lines.zh: 我喉咙痛，还咳嗽。没有发烧。

lines.en: I recommend this cold medicine. Take one pill three times a day after meals.
lines.zh: 我推荐这种感冒药。每天三次，饭后各吃一粒。

lines.en: How much is it? Is it safe for children?
lines.zh: 多少钱？小孩子可以吃吗？

lines.en: It is twenty-eight yuan. This one is for adults. For children, I suggest this syrup.
lines.zh: 二十八元。这个是成人吃的。如果是小孩子，我建议买这种糖浆。

lines.en: Good. I will take both. Can I pay by phone?
lines.zh: 好的，两个我都要。可以手机支付吗？

lines.en: Yes, you can scan the QR code here. Remember to drink more hot water and get plenty of rest.
lines.zh: 可以，您可以扫这里的二维码。记得多喝热水，好好休息。

lines.en: Thank you very much for your help. I hope I get well soon.
lines.zh: 非常感谢你的帮助。希望我早日康复。
